positions.label: Dive-bombing in support of 6. Armee's approach
Pulled back after the Tatsinskaya raid

summary: Stukageschwader 2 "Immelmann" was the most famous Luftwaffe dive-bomber wing, flying the Junkers Ju 87. Its most celebrated pilot, Hans-Ulrich Rudel, flew with I. Gruppe over the Eastern Front. At Stalingrad the Geschwader delivered concentrated dive-bombing in support of 6. Armee.
notes: Pilot coverage: Stalingrad (Aug 1942 – Feb 1943). Base keyframes are representative forward fields, not a day-by-day record.
